* Exemplo com acesso a banco Adabas: lê funcionários por nome
DEFINE DATA LOCAL
  1 EMPLOYEES VIEW OF EMPLOYEES-FILE
    2 NAME     (A30)
    2 CITY     (A20)
    2 SALARY   (N10.2)
  1 #COUNT    (I4)
END-DEFINE
*
RESET #COUNT
READ EMPLOYEES BY NAME
  IF SALARY > 5000
    ADD 1 TO #COUNT
    DISPLAY NAME CITY SALARY
  END-IF
END-READ
WRITE 'Total acima de 5000: ' #COUNT
END
